## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you believe that you've found a Horalix P2P-related security vulnerability,
please report it by sending email to the address security@horalix.com. The
[PGP key for security@horalix.com
(B683AD7B76CAB013)](https://horalix.com/security-key.txt) can be used to
send encrypted mail or to verify responses received from that address.

You can read more about Horalix P2P security at
https://github.com/Kerim-Sabic/horalixp2pvibe/security.
